data_avail: 5m native, IN-WINDOW (long5m HDFCBANK.csv covers 2026-04-27..07-17; 14-18 May 2026 fully inside) — numerically checkable on real tape; mark drawn on 30m
box_tol: MISS as one object. User box lo=760 hi=772, height=12.0pt = 1.57% of ~766 = 6.7x mean-5m-range. compression.py emits 17 micro-boxes in the SAME window, each = min-low/max-high of the last 6 5m candles, height 1.45-5.25pt (mean 3.77pt = 0.49% = 2.1x ATR5m) i.e. ~31% of the user height; top edge ~772 IS matched by a coil cluster (05-14 12:15 box hi 773.00; several ~771.45, within ~1pt/0.13%), but bottom edge 760 is never a box edge (nearest micro-box lo 764.00 on 05-18, +4pt). compression_fade.py draws NO box at all (pure break-fade signal). No single detector object spans the 12pt/4-session rectangle.
birth_match: miss — user box born from multi-session overlapping chop below the 15/05 swing high (a macro consolidation RANGE). compression.py births on score>=0.7 (contraction<0.6 + 6-body overlap + neg vol-slope + NR/inside cluster) while the leg PO3 FSM is IDLE/DISTRIBUTION — a 30-min coil, not a range; compression_fade births on a single doji (body<=0.35r, both wicks>=0.2r). Neither uses sweep+BOS nor 'consolidation under a swing high'.
entry_match: n/a — mark is UNLABELED (no entry). compression.py emits directional PO3_DIST (0.85) / BOX_ON_LEVEL (0.75) expansion evidence; compression_fade enters at the break-candle close. Neither is a range-box CE/edge entry.
sl_match: n/a — mark has no SL. compression_fade SL = literal break extreme (j.high/j.low), floored 0.15*ATR; compression.py emits no SL. No outer-wick vs body distinction applies to a range box.
numeric_gap: 1 hand-drawn macro range box (760-772, ~12pt, ~225 5m bars / ~40 30m bars) vs 17 compression.py micro-boxes (mean 3.77pt) + 40 compression_fade coil-fades in the identical window. Box-height reproduced ~31% (3.77/12); box-top matched within ~1pt (0.13%), box-bottom off by +4pt and never emitted as an edge. Detector recognises compression IS present in-region but fragments one zone into ~17-40 sub-events.
root_cause: scale/object mismatch (structural gap). PO3FSM.set_box is hard-wired to min(last6.low)/max(last6.high) => box capped at a 6-candle (30-min) coil; compression_fade is per-candle. No multi-bar range aggregator exists, so a ~4-session consolidation rectangle is not an expressible object. Recognition-positive (fires on the right phenomenon in the right window), geometry-negative (wrong scale, wrong birth, no macro box).

birth_match: miss — same as h4242: macro consolidation-range birth vs 30-min coil (compression.py) / single doji (compression_fade).
entry_match: n/a — unlabeled mark; detector emits PO3_DIST/BOX_ON_LEVEL or fade-at-break, not a range CE/edge.
sl_match: n/a — unlabeled mark; compression_fade SL=break extreme, compression.py none.
numeric_gap: duplicate of h4242 (same 760-772 box): 17 micro-boxes + 40 doji-fades in-window, ~31% height reproduced, top ±1pt, bottom +4pt. Counted as its own instance per no-silent-drop rule but adds no new geometry.
root_cause: duplicate of h4242 — same scale/object structural gap: no multi-bar range aggregator; last-6-candle box + per-candle doji fade cannot express a multi-session consolidation rectangle.
